_meta.source: Income Tax Act 1961, Finance Act 2025, CBDT Circulars
_meta.notes: This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all TDS rules. All agents and LLM prompts read from this file. Update this file when Budget amendments happen.

192.name: Salary
192.description: TDS on salary paid by employer

rate.note: As per income tax slab rates applicable to the employee

threshold.note: Basic exemption limit as per slab

192.notes: Employer must consider declarations under 80C, 80D, HRA etc.

194A.name: Interest other than interest on securities
194A.description: TDS on interest paid on deposits, loans, advances (not being interest on securities)

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate interest during FY does not exceed Rs 5,000

194A.payer: Bank, co-operative society, or any person paying interest
194A.frequency: At the time of credit or payment, whichever is earlier
exemptions: Interest on savings bank account up to Rs 10,000 (Sec 80TTA)
Interest to senior citizens up to Rs 50,000 (Sec 80TTB)

194C.name: Payment to contractor/sub-contractor
194C.description: TDS on payments to resident contractors and sub-contractors for carrying out any work (including supply of labour)

threshold.description: No TDS if single payment <= Rs 30,000 AND aggregate during FY <= Rs 1,00,000

194C.payer: Any person (other than individual/HUF not subject to audit)
194C.frequency: At the time of credit or payment, whichever is earlier
exemptions: Payments to transporters with PAN owning 10+ goods carriages — no TDS
Payments for personal purposes by individual/HUF
194C.notes: GST component should be excluded from TDS base if separately shown in invoice (CBDT Circular 23/2017)

194D.name: Insurance commission
194D.description: TDS on insurance commission paid to resident insurance agents

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate commission during FY does not exceed Rs 15,000

194DA.name: Payment in respect of life insurance policy
194DA.description: TDS on maturity proceeds of life insurance policy (including bonus)

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate payment does not exceed Rs 1,00,000

194H.name: Commission or brokerage
194H.description: TDS on commission or brokerage (not being insurance commission under 194D)

rate.amendment: Reduced from 5% to 2% by Finance Act 2025

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate commission/brokerage during FY does not exceed Rs 15,000

194H.notes: Rate was 5% until Finance Act 2025 changed it to 2%

194I_a.name: Rent on plant and machinery
194I_a.description: TDS on rent paid for plant, machinery, or equipment

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate rent during FY does not exceed Rs 2,40,000

194I_b.name: Rent on land, building, or furniture
194I_b.description: TDS on rent paid for land, building (including factory building), furniture or fittings

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate rent during FY does not exceed Rs 2,40,000

194J_a.name: Fee for technical services (to call centre)
194J_a.description: TDS on fees for technical services paid to call centres or similar operations

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate fees during FY does not exceed Rs 30,000

194J_b.name: Fee for professional or technical services
194J_b.description: TDS on fees for professional services, royalty, non-compete fees, or technical services (other than 194J(a))

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate fees during FY does not exceed Rs 30,000

194J_b.notes: Includes fees for any professional services as defined in Explanation to section 194J

194K.name: Payment of dividend or income from units of mutual fund
194K.description: TDS on income from units of mutual fund, UTI, or specified company

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate income does not exceed Rs 5,000

194LA.name: Payment of compensation on acquisition of certain immovable property
194LA.description: TDS on compensation or enhanced compensation on compulsory acquisition of immovable property

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate compensation does not exceed Rs 2,50,000

194M.name: Payment by individual/HUF to contractors and professionals
194M.description: TDS on payment of commission, brokerage, contractual payment, or professional fees by individual/HUF not liable to audit

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate payment does not exceed Rs 50,00,000 during FY

194M.notes: Applicable only when payer is individual/HUF NOT subject to tax audit

194N.name: Cash withdrawal
194N.description: TDS on cash withdrawal exceeding threshold from bank/post office/co-operative society

threshold.description: Rs 1 Cr if return filed, Rs 20L if return not filed for last 3 years

194O.name: Payment by e-commerce operator to participant
194O.description: TDS on payment of amount to e-commerce participant for sale of goods or provision of services facilitated by e-commerce operator

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate payment does not exceed Rs 5,00,000 during FY

194Q.name: Payment for purchase of goods
194Q.description: TDS on payment for purchase of goods by buyer whose total sales/gross receipts exceed Rs 10 Cr in preceding FY

threshold.description: No TDS if aggregate purchase from a seller does not exceed Rs 50,00,000 during FY. TDS on amount exceeding Rs 50L only.

194Q.notes: Applicable only if buyer's turnover exceeds Rs 10 Cr in preceding FY. Not applicable if seller is liable to collect TCS under 206C(1H).

195.name: Payment to non-resident
195.description: TDS on payment of any sum (other than salary) to a non-resident or foreign company

rate.note: Rates vary by nature of payment and DTAA provisions

threshold.description: No threshold — TDS on entire amount

195.notes: DTAA provisions may override domestic rates. Lower rate certificate under 197 may apply.

201_1A.name: Interest on late/non-deduction of TDS

conditions.from: date when TDS should have been deducted

201_1A.notes: Part of a month is considered full month. Interest is simple interest.

234E.name: Late filing fee for TDS return
234E.rate: Rs 200 per day until return is filed
234E.notes: Fee cannot exceed total TDS amount. Applicable from due date of filing.

271C.name: Penalty for failure to deduct TDS
271C.rate: Equal to the amount of TDS not deducted
271C.notes: Penalty equal to TDS amount. Can be waived if reasonable cause shown. AO must give opportunity of being heard.

271H.name: Penalty for late filing of TDS return
271H.notes: Applicable if return filed after 1 year from due date. Not applicable if fees u/s 234E already levied.

276B.name: Prosecution for failure to deposit TDS
276B.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment from 3 months to 7 years with fine
276B.notes: Criminal prosecution. Applicable if TDS deducted but not deposited to government within prescribed time.

deposit.government: Same day as deduction (for government deductors)

certificate_issue.form_16A: Within 15 days from due date of filing TDS return

26Q.purpose: TDS on all payments other than salary to residents

Form_26AS.purpose: Annual Tax Statement — shows all TDS credits for a PAN

Form_15G.purpose: Declaration by individual (below 60) that income is below taxable limit

Form_15H.purpose: Declaration by senior citizen (60+) that tax on total income is nil

advertisement.classification_guide: 194C if works contract (printing, production, hoarding installation). 194J(b) if creative/professional services (ad agency fees, digital marketing, content creation). Check invoice description.

annual_maintenance.classification_guide: 194C if facility/physical maintenance (building, equipment). 194J(b) if technical/software maintenance (AMC for software, IT support). Check contract terms.

software.classification_guide: 194J(b) for software license, royalty, SaaS subscription. 194C for custom software development contract (works contract). Check if it's a license or development.
